description: Horizontal connected timeline with prominent phase nodes. Designed for temporal/sequential data stored as an object with a phases array and optional mode badge. Each phase is a colored numbered node with a label card and expandable description below.

phases_field.description: Key in the data object containing the phases array

label_field.description: Field within each phase item for the node label

description_field.description: Field within each phase item for the expandable description

mode_field.description: Optional top-level field for a mode badge (e.g., 'mixed', 'linear', 'cyclical')

section_description.description: Optional description shown above the timeline
